about.title: About Dr. Sunil Shewale
about.subtitle: Dr. Shewale's Sai Heart Care, Solapur
about.description1: Dr. Sunil Shewale is a renowned Interventional Cardiologist in Solapur with extensive experience in the field of cardiology. He completed his MBBS and MD in General Medicine, followed by a prestigious DM in Cardiology. With years of dedicated practice, Dr. Shewale has become one of the most trusted names in cardiac care in the region.
about.description2: His expertise spans across a wide range of cardiac procedures including coronary angiography, angioplasty, pacemaker implantation, and pediatric cardiac interventions. Dr. Shewale's Sai Heart Care is equipped with state-of-the-art facilities to provide comprehensive cardiac care to patients of all ages.

treatments.title: Treatments We Offer For
treatments.cad_desc: Comprehensive diagnosis and treatment of blocked or narrowed coronary arteries.
treatments.hf_desc: Advanced management of heart failure with modern therapeutic approaches.
treatments.congenital_desc: Specialized care for heart defects present from birth in children and adults.
treatments.arrhythmias_desc: Expert treatment of irregular heartbeats and rhythm disorders.
treatments.cardiomyopathy_desc: Diagnosis and management of diseases affecting the heart muscle.
treatments.pad_desc: Treatment of narrowed arteries reducing blood flow to limbs.
treatments.hypertension_desc: Comprehensive management of high blood pressure and related complications.
treatments.diabetes_desc: Cardiac care for patients with diabetes and related heart conditions.
treatments.tavi_desc: Minimally invasive procedure to replace a narrowed or diseased aortic valve without traditional open-heart surgery.

cad_details.overview: Coronary Artery Disease (CAD) occurs when the coronary arteries that supply blood to the heart muscle become hardened and narrowed due to a build-up of plaque. It is the most common type of heart disease and the leading cause of death worldwide.

heart_failure_details.overview: Heart failure is a chronic condition where the heart doesn't pump blood as efficiently as it should.

congenital_details.overview: Congenital heart disease refers to structural problems with the heart that are present at birth.

arrhythmias_details.overview: Arrhythmia refers to any disorder of the heart rate or rhythm.

cardiomyopathy_details.overview: Cardiomyopathy is a disease of the heart muscle that makes it harder for the heart to pump blood.

pad_details.overview: Peripheral Artery Disease (PAD) is a circulatory problem in which narrowed arteries reduce blood flow to the limbs.

hypertension_details.overview: Hypertension (high blood pressure) is a condition in which the blood pressure in the arteries is persistently elevated.

diabetes_details.overview: Diabetes significantly increases the risk of heart disease.

tavi_details.overview: TAVI is a procedure to replace a narrowed aortic valve without open-heart surgery.

cardiac_consultation.title: Cardiac Consultation
cardiac_consultation.desc: Comprehensive heart evaluations by experienced cardiologists.
cardiac_consultation.overview: A cardiac consultation is a comprehensive evaluation of your heart health conducted by an experienced cardiologist.
whatToExpect: Detailed medical and family history review

ecg.title: ECG
ecg.desc: State-of-the-art electrocardiography for rapid, accurate detection of arrhythmias.
ecg.overview: An Electrocardiogram (ECG) is a quick, painless test that records the electrical signals in your heart.

echo.title: 2D Echo (Adult & Pediatric)
echo.desc: High-resolution echocardiography for evaluating heart structure and function.
echo.overview: 2D Echocardiography uses high-frequency sound waves to create moving images of the heart.

tmt.title: Treadmill Test (TMT)
tmt.desc: Exercise stress testing to uncover hidden coronary artery disease.
tmt.overview: TMT evaluates how well your heart performs under physical stress.

abpm.title: Ambulatory BP Monitoring
abpm.desc: 24-hour blood pressure recording to capture real-world fluctuations.
abpm.overview: ABPM involves wearing a portable BP monitor for 24 hours to record blood pressure at regular intervals.

holter.title: Holter Monitoring
holter.desc: Continuous 24-48 hour ECG recording worn during daily activities.
holter.overview: Holter Monitoring is a continuous ECG recording that captures intermittent arrhythmias.

angioplasty.title: Angioplasty
angioplasty.desc: Minimally invasive balloon angioplasty with stent placement.
angioplasty.overview: Coronary Angioplasty is a minimally invasive procedure to open narrowed coronary arteries.

pacemaker.title: Pacemaker Implantation
pacemaker.desc: Expert implantation of pacemakers for patients with bradycardia or heart block.
pacemaker.overview: A pacemaker is a device implanted to regulate abnormal heart rhythms.
